chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Fasting Obligations for the mutamatti' Who Cannot Afford a Sacrificial Animal

text: 3102 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «اَلصَّبِيُّ يَصُومُ عَنْهُ وَلِيُّهُ إِذَا لَمْ يَجِدْ هَدْياً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3102 - Abdul Rahman ibn Ayan narrated from Abu Ja'far (as), who said: "A guardian should fast on behalf of a child if the child does not have a sacrificial animal."
